not_applicable_reason: A manual fused LayerNorm/RMSNorm optimization is not applicable here because the model does not implement a custom normalization kernel path; it uses standard PyTorch nn.LayerNorm modules, and the code already relies on torch.compile, which can automatically fuse normalization-adjacent operations. Applying Apex FusedLayerNorm would introduce a new dependency and is not warranted for this codebase under the requested single optimization.
